## Summary

- What changed?
- Why does it matter?

## Scope

- [ ] CLI
- [ ] Viewer
- [ ] Core
- [ ] Schema
- [ ] Adapters
- [ ] Fixtures
- [ ] Docs / repo scaffolding

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm test:generated` (if export/test generation changed)

## Release notes

- [ ] No release note needed
- [ ] Added a changeset with `pnpm changeset`

## Notes for reviewers

- Trace bundles, screenshots, replay reports, or follow-up context:
